description: "whenever possible" is a vague quantifier with no measurable criteria for when isomorphic code is required
suggested_fix: Replace with specific runtime targets, e.g., "Write code compatible with Node 18+, Chrome 110+, and Cloudflare Workers unless the module is explicitly @env-tagged"

description: "complex" is unmeasured; reader cannot determine when a type qualifies as complex enough to extract
suggested_fix: Replace with a measurable trigger, e.g., "When a type expression exceeds one line or is used in more than one location, extract it"

description: Technical skill covering SSR, routing, and data-fetching has no inline code examples; all examples are deferred to sub-reference files
suggested_fix: Add a Quick Start section with a minimal useFetch and server route example to anchor the reference tables

description: State management skill has no inline code; all examples deferred to sub-reference files
suggested_fix: Add a minimal defineStore + storeToRefs usage snippet to the body

description: "Prefer Setup Stores for complex logic, composables, and watchers" — "complex" is vague without a size or structural threshold
suggested_fix: Replace with a concrete trigger, e.g., "Use Setup Stores when the store owns more than one watcher or calls an external composable"

description: Package manager skill with catalog, patch, and workspace features has no inline examples
suggested_fix: Add a 3-line pnpm-workspace.yaml catalog snippet and a one-line override example

description: File is 405 lines, in the 400–500 penalty range; consider splitting Common Patterns into a separate reference
suggested_fix: Move the 9-item Common Patterns section to references/common-patterns.md and add a single reference row in the main table

description: File is 912 lines, nearly double the 500-line ceiling; context overhead is high for every invocation
suggested_fix: Split Critical Anti-Patterns (lines 218–718) into a references/anti-patterns.md and replace with a single table row linking to it

description: "ONLY for tasks that truly cannot exist in packages (rare)" — both "truly" and "(rare)" are unmeasured; no objective test for whether a task qualifies
suggested_fix: Replace with an explicit criterion, e.g., "ONLY for tasks that have no package.json to place them in, such as a repo-wide cleanup that touches all packages simultaneously"

description: Section heading "Overly Broad globalDependencies" uses "overly" without a measurable threshold for what constitutes too broad
suggested_fix: Replace heading with "globalDependencies Affecting More Than One Task" to make the scope boundary explicit

description: Atomic CSS engine skill with custom rules, shortcuts, and presets has no inline examples in the SKILL.md body
suggested_fix: Add a 5-line uno.config.ts snippet demonstrating a custom rule and shortcut

description: "If the project setup is unclear, avoid attributify mode" — "unclear" is vague; agent cannot determine when setup qualifies as unclear
suggested_fix: Replace with: "If no uno.config.* file is found in the project root, avoid attributify mode and stick to class-based utilities"

description: SSG skill with custom theme and Vue-in-Markdown features has no inline code examples
suggested_fix: Add a minimal .vitepress/config.ts + one Markdown-with-Vue-component example

description: Testing framework skill has no inline test examples; all deferred to sub-reference files
suggested_fix: Add a 10-line describe/it/expect snippet showing a basic component test pattern

description: Workflow skill guiding Vue component architecture has no inline code despite covering props, composables, and SFC structure
suggested_fix: Add a minimal <script setup lang="ts"> component skeleton illustrating the props-down / events-up contract

description: "Create a brief component map for any non-trivial feature" — no objective threshold for when a feature is non-trivial
suggested_fix: Replace with a specific trigger: "Create a component map when a feature requires more than one component or introduces shared state"

description: "Create a brief component map" — "brief" is unmeasured
suggested_fix: Remove "brief"; describe the expected output: "List each component's single responsibility and its props/emits contract"

description: "substantial presentational markup for multiple sections" — "substantial" is vague
suggested_fix: Replace with: "more than 30 lines of template markup across more than one distinct UI section"

description: "Keep entry/root and route view components thin" — "thin" is unmeasured
suggested_fix: Replace with: "Keep entry/root components to app-shell wiring; no feature logic, no data fetching, no business state"

description: "Allow single-file implementation only for very small throwaway demos" — "very small" is vague
suggested_fix: Replace with: "Allow single-file implementation only when the component is fewer than 50 lines and will not be reused"

description: Navigation guard and route lifecycle skill has no inline code examples; all deferred to sub-reference files
suggested_fix: Add a 5-line beforeEach guard skeleton showing the correct return-value pattern

description: Testing patterns skill has no inline code; all deferred to sub-reference files
suggested_fix: Add a minimal mountWithPinia helper snippet to illustrate the store-setup pattern

description: File is 420 lines (400–500 penalty range); the function catalog could be split by category
suggested_fix: Split the @Electron, @Firebase, @Math, @Motion, @RxJS, @SchemaOrg sections into separate sub-skills and reference them

description: 420-line function catalog with no code examples; every function says 'consult the reference' but no usage pattern is shown inline
suggested_fix: Add one representative usage example per category section (e.g., useLocalStorage for State, useDraggable for Elements, useFetch for Network)

description: Description: "Apply VueUse composables where appropriate" — "appropriate" is a vague trigger qualifier with no specifics
suggested_fix: Replace description trigger with: "Apply VueUse composables when a built-in browser API, event listener, storage access, or reactive state pattern is needed"

description: "Map requirements to the most suitable VueUse function" — no criteria for evaluating suitability
suggested_fix: Replace with: "Match requirements to the function in the tables below; prefer the function whose Description column exactly names the requirement"

description: "Map requirements to the most appropriate VueUse function" — duplicates the suitability vagueness from line 12
suggested_fix: Remove this sentence; it repeats line 12 with different vague wording

description: "ask to install only if truly needed" — "truly needed" has no measurable threshold
suggested_fix: Replace with: "ask the user to install the external package before proceeding; do not install automatically"

description: UI review skill has no inline code examples or sample violation output to anchor reviewer behavior
suggested_fix: Add a 3-line example violation snippet (e.g., a button missing aria-label) in the terse file:line format

description: No scope note clarifying what this skill does NOT cover (e.g., performance, SEO, backend API design) or which related skills to use instead
suggested_fix: Add: "Covers visual, accessibility, and interaction guidelines. For performance audits, see a dedicated perf skill. For SEO, see SEO skill."

description: exec() wrapper calls execSync for git submodule operations; inputs derive from meta.ts config and .gitmodules parsing, not direct user input, but the shell execution surface exists
suggested_fix: Validate all string inputs passed to exec() against an allowlist of expected URL/path patterns before shell execution

description: rmSync({ recursive: true }) deletes directories whose paths are derived from .gitmodules parsing; a crafted .gitmodules could influence which directories are deleted
suggested_fix: Assert that the resolved path starts with path.resolve(root) before calling rmSync to prevent path-traversal deletion

description: prepare script runs simple-git-hooks and git submodule update on pnpm install; standard for a private dev repo but executes code on install
suggested_fix: Document the prepare behavior in README so contributors understand what runs on install; no code change required for a private repo

description: All 7 devDependencies use ^ ranges; minor-version supply-chain drift possible in a reproducible build tool
suggested_fix: Pin exact versions (remove ^) and use pnpm update explicitly when upgrading; lockfile already pins transitive deps but direct deps drift on fresh installs without lockfile

pattern: external URL fetch for runtime instructions
description: Skill instructs agents to WebFetch rule content from raw.githubusercontent.com at runtime; if the upstream repo is compromised the injected content becomes agent instructions
suggested_fix: Add an inline summary of the top-10 rules as a fallback so the skill functions when the URL is unavailable, and note the fetch as supplementary rather than primary

description: vue-router-best-practices and vue-testing-best-practices use reference/ (singular) while all antfu-generated skills use references/ (plural); both are internally consistent but the divergence reflects different upstream source conventions
suggested_fix: No code change required; references resolve correctly. Document the two naming conventions in a CONTRIBUTING note for cross-skill link authors
